description: Developing enterprise-grade automation solutions, specializing in crafting scalable, high-performance systems for SMBs. My expertise spans from backend infrastructure development to comprehensive workflow automation.

At beta.cupidai.tech (15k MRR), I developed the backend infrastructure for a deepfake generation service. I designed scalable systems, ensuring high performance, and maintaining the overall reliability of our platform.

I developed a location-based, real-time messaging app. My responsibilities included implementing Telegram-like chat features, enabling full-text search across location databases, tracking user actions within the app, and integrating both Apple and Google Maps with some clustering techniques.
